files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "host": string;
  "region": string;
  "status": string;
  "cpu": number;
  "uptime": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Server Inventory",
  "description": "Live server status — scroll, header stays.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "compact",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": false,
  "enableRowSelection": false,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": false,
  "enableStriped": true,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": true,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "host",
      "label": "Hostname",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "region",
      "label": "Region",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "us-east": "default",
        "us-west": "secondary",
        "eu-central": "outline",
        "ap-south": "default"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "status-dot",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "Healthy",
          "value": "Healthy",
          "color": "hsl(142 71% 45%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Degraded",
          "value": "Degraded",
          "color": "hsl(38 92% 50%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Down",
          "value": "Down",
          "color": "hsl(0 84% 60%)"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "cpu",
      "label": "CPU %",
      "type": "progress",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "uptime",
      "label": "Uptime",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
